active_plot.instruction: Select an empty plot below to plant seeds.

screen.error_connect_desc: Cannot connect to server. Boss might be active — try again in a few seconds.

marquee.appear_message: ⚠️ {{icon}} {{bossName}} ({{label}}) has appeared! Defeat the boss to protect the harvest!

rewards.not_participated_desc: Attack the boss next time to get rewards!

nft_reveal.error_desc: Could not create NFT card. Please contact admin.

info.waiting_notice: You will be notified when the Boss reappears.
info.damage_reduction_hint: Damage from players will be reduced

rate_info: 💡 Rate: 1,000 Seed = 1 OGN · 5% fee per conversion
no_wallet_msg: No wallet yet. Wallet will be created automatically upon your next login.
gas_fee_deducted: Gas fee will be deducted from wallet balance
private_key_warning: Private key allows full access to your wallet. DO NOT share with anyone.
import_metamask_msg: Import to MetaMask or Trust Wallet:
smart_wallet_desc: Create a blockchain wallet using fingerprint. No MetaMask or seed phrase needed.
send_avax_instruction: Send AVAX to the address below. Ensure the right network
wrong_network_warning: Sending via wrong network will result in irreversible loss of funds.
wallet_auto_activate_msg: Wallet will automatically activate upon your first transaction (gas-free).
wrong_network_loss_warning: Sending on the wrong network will result in permanent loss.
reset_stats_desc: All stat points will be refunded. You can allocate them again.
insufficient_ogn: You do not have enough OGN to perform this action.
link_telegram_desc: Link Telegram to log in faster
open_telegram_to_link: Open game in Telegram to link your account
wallet_linked_desc: Wallet has been linked to your account.
wallet_unlinked_desc: Link your wallet to receive on-chain rewards and trade OGN token.
app_crashed_reload: Application crashed unexpectedly. Please reload the page.
stat_desc_atk: Attack stat — decides the damage you deal to the boss.
stat_effect_atk_1: Each ⭐ gem also deals extra damage
stat_tip_atk: To defeat boss quickly → focus ATK
stat_desc_hp: Vitality stat — decides how many hits you can take from the boss.
stat_milestone_desc_hp_2: Revive once per match upon death
stat_tip_hp: To survive longer, fight strong boss → focus HP
stat_desc_def: Defense stat — mitigates damage taken from the boss.
stat_effect_def_0: Boss hits hurt less (up to 50% reduction)
stat_tip_def: Boss hits hard this week → focus DEF to tank
stat_desc_mana: Magic energy — used to DODGE boss attacks and cast ultimate (ULT).
stat_effect_mana_3: High mana → use DODGE + ULT more
stat_tip_mana: Like to spam DODGE + ULT → focus Mana
select_wallet_to_login: Select a wallet to login with
select_wallet_to_link: Select a wallet to link with your
exit_battle_desc: Progress in this battle will not be saved.
retreat_desc: Are you sure you want to retreat? This will count as a loss.
no_fights_left: Used up {{max}} battles today. Come back tomorrow!
unallocated_desc: Go to Profile → Stats to increase your power.
boss_rep_xanh_desc: Chubby caterpillar eating young leaves. Take it down!
boss_sau_to_desc: Diamondback moth larva spinning webs. Don't let it rampage!
boss_bo_rua_desc: A greedy ladybug. Cute but highly destructive!
boss_chau_chau_desc: Locust jumping around. It eats super fast!
boss_bo_xit_desc: Stink bug, smelly and dangerous. Beware its gas!
boss_oc_sen_desc: Snail that crawls slowly but very tough. Hit it brings death!
boss_chuot_dong_desc: Cunning field mouse. It eats roots too!
boss_rong_lua_desc: Legendary Fire Dragon guarding the ancient garden. Beat it to enter the club!
no_bids_history: You haven't placed any bids yet.
no_listings_history: You haven't listed any NFTs yet.
no_active_spotlight: No Spotlight sessions active right now
no_active_side: No side sessions active right now
go_to_collection_hint: Go to Collection to submit NFTs for auction!
confirm_withdraw_queue_msg: NFT will be returned to your Collection. You can submit it again anytime.
create_auction_warning: ⚠️ NFT will be locked immediately. You can withdraw before the session starts.
no_bids_yet_hint: You haven't placed a bid — click BID to join!
sd_higher_bid_hint: Place a higher bid to win
sd_lose_hint: 💡 If you don't bid, you lose

otp_claim.review_note_placeholder: E.g. Deliver after 18:00, leave at security...
otp_claim.address_error: Please enter full address (at least 10 characters)

delivery_detail.title: Delivery Details
delivery_detail.name: Name
delivery_detail.blockchain_note: Data will be recorded on-chain daily at 00:00

qr_scanner.title: Scan QR to Claim
qr_scanner.instruction: Point camera at the QR on delivery bill
qr_scanner.error_camera: Cannot open camera. Please grand permission or enter code manually.
qr_scanner.error_invalid_qr: Invalid QR. Please scan the QR on the delivery bill again.
qr_scanner.error_not_farmverse: Not a FARMVERSE QR. Please scan the QR on the delivery bill.
qr_scanner.error_mismatch: QR does not match this gift box. Please double check.
qr_scanner.error_missing_data: QR is missing data. Please enter code manually.

blockchain_proof.title: Blockchain Proof
blockchain_proof.not_delivered_desc: Receive item before viewing blockchain proof
blockchain_proof.pending_desc: Data will be recorded to chain within 12h

manual_verify.title: Enter Claim Code
manual_verify.instruction: Enter the 6-digit code on the delivery bill:

my_garden.title: My Garden
my_garden.instruction: boxes/day. Click 'Claim Gift' to fill delivery info. Upon receiving, click 'Scan to Claim' or enter 6-digit code to confirm.

locked_garden.title: My Garden
locked_garden.desc: Fresh veggies from CDHC farm delivered to your door weekly!

screens.claim_failed: Failed to claim reward. Please try again.
screens.unlock_skills_desc1: Unlock new skills by defeating bosses in the campaign.
screens.unlock_skills_desc2: Collect skill fragments 🧩 from boss drops.

sam_dong.name: Thunderclap
sam_dong.desc: Ultimate: Deals massive damage to the boss.

ot_hiem.name: Spicy Pepper
ot_hiem.desc: Increases damage for a short time.

rom_boc.name: Straw Shield
rom_boc.desc: Creates a shield and reduces incoming damage.

ui.streak_daily_desc: Log in every day to get rewards!
ui.result_error: Results not recorded due to connection error.

special.4: Spawns eggs every 5 turns: if not destroyed → heals 15% HP
special.6: Cocoon: reduces damage by 50% for 1 turn every 5 turns
special.8: 20% dodge + Pollen: -15% ATK × 2 turns every 4 turns
special.14: Shuffles 2 rows + drains 10% Mana every 4 turns
special.15: Stuns 1 turn every 4 turns + drains 15% Mana
special.18: Debuff: -15% ATK for 2 turns every 5 turns
special.20: Hide in shell: immune to damage 2t/6t. Slime <30%: -20% ATK permanently
special.23: Burrow: hides for 1t/4t, returns to deal ×4 damage
special.28: True damage 10% MaxHP/3t. Locks 2 tiles 2t. Rage < 20%: ATK ×2
special.32: HP>60%: DEF+200. Wave 8% MaxHP/4t. Flood 1t/8t. <30%: DEF=0 ATK ×2
special.35: Revives once with 25% HP. Burns 2 tiles/3t
special.36: True damage 10% MaxHP/3t. Burn 2 tiles/4t. < 15%: ATK ×2.5, self-damage 3% HP/t
special.37: Spores on death: 4 mushroom tiles (match = 4% MaxHP)
special.40: 4 PHASES: P1 Tank → P2 Assassin → P3 Healer → P4 Glass Cannon

glass_cannon.label: Glass Cannon
glass_cannon.tip: Kill fast, dodge when boss rages

tank.label: Tank
tank.tip: High ATK to break armor. Be patient in phase 1, burst in rage.

healer.label: Healer
healer.tip: DPS must exceed heal. Burst when guard is down.

assassin.label: Assassin
assassin.tip: DEF reduction per hit ×Freq. Dodge rage phase.

controller.label: Controller
controller.tip: High Mana resists drain well. Remember stun pattern.

hybrid.label: Hybrid
hybrid.tip: DPS race. Dodge true damage. Boss self-destructs at low HP.

all.label: Emperor
all.tip: 4 phases: Tank→Assassin→Healer→Glass. Save Mana in P1, Dodge in P2, Burst in P3, Survive P4

tank.description: Extremely high DEF, slow attacks. Focus on armor break.

assassin.description: 3 continuous strikes, very high ATK. DODGE or die!

healer.description: Heals 3% HP every 5 seconds. DPS race — burst quickly!

glass_cannon.description: Max ATK, auto loses 2% HP/5s. Survive = win!

special.6: Shield: Reduces damage from Red gems by 50%
special.8: Randomly locks 2 player skills for 3 turns
special.9: Spider Queen: Summons spiderlings to block the board
special.11: Each hit reduces player ATK by 10% (stacks)
special.12: Toxic Worm: Spreads toxic spikes, player takes damage per move
special.13: Mad Rabbit: x2 Speed when HP < 50%
special.14: Escape: Will run away if not defeated in 15 turns
special.16: Shadow Clone: Creates 2 illusions that share HP
special.18: Lifesteal: Heals HP equal to 50% of damage dealt
special.19: Iron Skin: Immune to magic damage (Elemental gems)
special.22: Enrage: ATK increases by 20% every passing turn
special.25: Panda: Eats bamboo to fully heal if left unchecked
special.28: Dragon King: Summons meteor shower every 10 turns
special.30: Toxic Toad: Explodes on death causing massive damage
special.31: Python: Constricts, draining 5% Max HP per turn
special.32: Crocodile King: Death Roll ignores DEF
special.34: Magma: Turns red gems into time bombs
special.36: Fire God: Summons fire pillars to destroy the grid
special.37: Darkness: Obscures part of the battle grid
special.40: Demon Lord: Changes mechanics every 25% HP
